# {{ .Site.Title }}

> {{ .Site.Params.description | default "" }}

## About Everappz

Everappz S.L. is a Spanish software company that develops iOS and macOS applications for audio playback, video playback, and music metadata management. The two-person team has accumulated over 14 million app downloads worldwide. Evermusic alone accounts for 11 million downloads and holds a 4.6-star rating from over 18,000 App Store reviews. Flacbox, a lossless audio player supporting FLAC, DSD, and 120+ formats, surpassed 1 million downloads. The company distributes exclusively through the Apple App Store.

- Founded: 2023
- Location: Spain
- Team size: 2
- Total downloads: 14+ million
- App Store developer: [Everappz on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/developer/everappz/id892803498)

## Products

- [Evermusic - Offline Music Player]({{ .Site.BaseURL }}products/evermusic/): Cloud music player for iOS and macOS with 11 million downloads. Supports iCloud, Dropbox, Google Drive, and 12+ cloud services. Features offline download, equalizer, CarPlay, and gapless playback. Rated 4.6/5 from 18,000+ App Store reviews.
- [Flacbox - Hi-Res Music Player]({{ .Site.BaseURL }}products/flacbox/): Lossless music player supporting 120+ audio formats including FLAC, DSD, ALAC, APE, and WAV. Over 1 million downloads. 10-band equalizer, cloud streaming, and metadata editor. No subscription required.
- [Evertag - Music Tag Editor]({{ .Site.BaseURL }}products/evertag/): Music metadata editor for iOS and macOS. Edit ID3 tags, album artwork, lyrics, and 120+ tag fields. Batch editing, automatic tag lookup, and cloud file support.
- [Evervideo - Video Player]({{ .Site.BaseURL }}products/evervideo/): Video player for iOS with cloud storage integration. Plays MKV, AVI, MP4, and other formats. Supports subtitles, picture-in-picture, and AirPlay.
